title: Wise Guys
writer: Claude Chabrol, Paul Gégauff, Eric Ollivier
actors: Jean-Claude Brialy, Bernadette Lafont, Jean Tissier
plot: Roland, an idler living on the Left Bank in Paris, is determined to inflict a terrible revenge on his friend Arthur, after the latter subjected him to a harmless joke. He engages the services of the seductive Ambroisine, who prete...
